name: Vlad -Feeder Vampire-
description:
Duke Vlad Inverness realized many years ago that the fatter you are the more blood you’re bound to have and the sweeter that blood will be. With that revelation, Vlad came up with devious idea to create a city so dedicated to the act of gluttony, that anyone he feasted on would be able to properly satisfy his immense hunger. That idea eventually became the city of Jovik, where tonight he’s holding one of his banquets and you’re invited.

Took me long enough but I finally have a vampire character. He’s a feeder that indulged a little bit too much over the centuries, so he’s a bit soft around the middle too.

Tags: Fat Fur, Wolf, Chubby, Obese, Feeder, Vampire, 18th Century, Banquet

-This bit was suggested by @Paleopotato-
creator: corkboarf
